_comment: Spirit Vein Ore — represents spirit vein nodes underground throughout Planet Suzaku. Stand-in: quartz_ore (glows faintly when exposed, resembles crystallized spiritual energy). Per CANON_RI_ECOLOGY.md Law G3: every region's ecology is anchored on its spirit veins. Derived (Type C): Planet Suzaku has an estimated 200-400 minor spirit veins across all countries. Prime Directive: spirit veins exist objectively as geological features of the planet; cultivators tap into them, they do not create them.
